title: callista luteola
intro: Callista luteola, also known as the butterfly orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders. The health benefits of Callista luteola include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
